title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the the Municipal Tricycle Pedicab Franchising and Regulatory Board (MTPFRB) Resolution No. 2022-08 Dated July 27, 2022 Entitled ? Resolution Humbly Requesting the Honorable Sangguniang Barangay of Batong Malake Headed by Barangay Chairman Ian N. Kalaw to Implement the Provisions of Existing Ordinances with Regard to the Operations of Pedicab / E-bike for Hire Units Within the Jurisdiction of Barangay Batong Malake.
